name: maxiedit
description: MaxiEdit mobile app — Capacitor wrapper (Android + iOS) around the web prototype

scripts.sync:www: rm -rf www && mkdir www && cp index.html www/index.html && cp -R images www/images
scripts.cap:add:android: npm run sync:www && npx cap add android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run sync:www && npx cap sync android
scripts.cap:run:android: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.cap:build:android: npm run cap:sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.cap:add:ios: npm run sync:www && npx cap add ios
scripts.cap:sync:ios: npm run sync:www && npx cap sync ios
scripts.cap:run:ios: npm run cap:sync:ios && npx cap run ios
scripts.cap:build:ios: npm run cap:sync:ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Debug -sdk iphonesimulator build
